positive: A vibrant, symmetrical celestial whale silhouette swimming through a deep, cosmic nebula. The whale should have intricate bioluminescent markings that emit a soft, electric teal and magenta glow. The background nebula is a swirling mix of deep indigo, royal purple, and vivid cyan, rendered with fine, pointillist starlight. Style: Neo-abstract, high-contrast vector illustration mixed with cosmic watercolor wash. Composition: Perfect central placement, suitable for full-chest print. Lighting: Dramatic backlighting from the glowing creature against the dark cosmos. Print details: Must be highly vectorized, clean lines, minimal gradient noise, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, low resolution, poor anatomy, extra limbs, bad edges, grainy, jpeg artifacts, noise
